title: AI Resume Matcher
description: Make hiring easy by Screening resumes with AI, Match candidates to job requirements

title: Bionic Hand
description: The project develops a multi-finger bionic hand driven by DC motors and controlled by an STM32L476RGTx microcontroller, integrating flex-sensor-based position feedback, current-based load sensing, and real-time closed loop control.

title: Face Recognition System
description: Face Recognition System using deep learning, CNN, and TensorFlow.

title: Carpooling #1
description: ST Carpooling APP - Group 1. A mobile application designed for ST employees to share rides, optimize commutes, and reduce carbon footprint.

description: ST Carpooling APP - Group 2. A mobile application designed for ST employees to share rides, optimize commutes, and reduce carbon footprint.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe Model
description: AI-based Tic-Tac-Toe system using YOLO object detection on STM32MP257 for board recognition.

title: Wheel Encoderless Robot Odometry
description: Developed a low-cost odometry system using a mouse sensor and smartphone magnetometer to estimate robot position and orientation without wheel encoders.

title: Teach Pendant on STM32H725
description: Developing a teach pendant control interface using the high-performance STM32H725 microcontroller.

title: Customer Project (nRF9160 DK)
description: Cellular IoT customer project developed on the nRF9160 DK board for asset tracking and sensor data logging.

title: MiVRy Gesture Recognition
description: Exploration of the Sentis AI Inferencing Library for gesture recognition and ST Robotics VR app.

title: Linux/Open CV
description: Computer vision and image processing application deployed on Linux platforms.

title: Face Detection on STM32N6
description: Deploying face detection models on the next-generation STM32N6 MCU for TechBlazer’s Faces.

title: IMU Calibration for Acceleration
description: Precision calibration algorithms for Inertial Measurement Units (IMU) to measure accurate acceleration.

title: ToF Gestures based GUI control
description: Gesture-controlled graphical user interface using Time-of-Flight sensors and TouchGFX.

title: LLM for KiCAD Schematic Gen
description: Applying Large Language Models to automate schematic generation and design validation in KiCAD.

title: Website for Conference Link Updating
description: A web portal designed to dynamically manage and update conference schedules and link directories.

title: Security + Touch GFX
description: Integrating security protocols and secure UI workflows using TouchGFX on STM32 hardware.

title: ToF+Piezo Buzzer
description: Proximity alarm and feedback system using Time-of-Flight sensors and a piezo buzzer.

title: ANPR
description: Automatic Number Plate Recognition system designed to detect and read license plates from video streams.

title: Motor Control with STM32CubeMX
description: Configuring and programming advanced motor control algorithms using STM32CubeMX and timers.

title: BOM Tool Development Deployment
description: Bill of Materials (BOM) management tool to streamline component sourcing, pricing, and lifecycle tracking.

title: TechBlazer Website
description: Website development for TechBlazers program.
